requirement_topic.en: GEMS Registry pre-supply registration — unique Australian market-access requirement
requirement_topic.zh: GEMS 注册系统供应前注册 — 澳大利亚独有的市场准入要求
requirement_topic.zht: GEMS 注冊系統供應前注冊 — 澳洲獨有的市場准入要求

summary.en: The GEMS Act 2012 requires that a 'responsible supplier' (the importer or Australian-based supplier) register each covered motor model on the GEMS Registry (energyrating.gov.au) BEFORE the model can lawfully be supplied in Australia. Registration requires submitting product information, test data demonstrating compliance with the applicable MEPS level, and the supplier's details. There is no equivalent pre-supply product registry in China. Supplying a motor model that is not registered on the GEMS Registry is an offence under the GEMS Act, regardless of the motor's actual energy efficiency performance.
summary.zh: 《GEMS 法案 2012》要求「责任供应商」（进口商或澳大利亚本地供应商）在向澳大利亚合法供应某型号电动机之前，须将其注册至 GEMS 注册系统（energyrating.gov.au）。注册须提交产品信息、证明符合适用 MEPS 等级的测试数据及供应商详情。中国无类似的供应前产品注册系统。无论电动机实际能效性能如何，供应未在 GEMS 注册系统注册的电动机型号均构成《GEMS 法案》下的违法行为。
summary.zht: 《GEMS 法案 2012》要求「責任供應商」（進口商或澳洲本地供應商）在向澳洲合法供應某型號電動機之前，須將其注冊至 GEMS 注冊系統（energyrating.gov.au）。注冊須提交產品信息、證明符合適用 MEPS 等級的測試數據及供應商詳情。中國無類似的供應前產品注冊系統。無論電動機實際能效性能如何，供應未在 GEMS 注冊系統注冊的電動機型號均構成《GEMS 法案》下的違法行為。

standards_or_laws: GEMS Act 2012 (Greenhouse and Energy Minimum Standards Act 2012)
GEMS (Three Phase Electric Motors) Determination (current version — verify at energyrating.gov.au)

summary.en: China has no pre-supply product registry equivalent to the Australian GEMS Registry for electric motors. Chinese manufacturers must comply with GB 18613-2020 for domestic sale, but there is no requirement to register individual motor models on a government database before supply. CCC (China Compulsory Certification) applies to specific product categories listed in the CNCA compulsory catalogue; standard industrial three-phase motors are generally not in the compulsory CCC catalogue, so no pre-supply CCC registration is typically required for domestic China supply. There is no bilateral recognition arrangement between Australia and China regarding GEMS registration.
summary.zh: 中国对电动机没有类似澳大利亚 GEMS 注册系统的供应前产品注册要求。中国制造商在国内销售须符合 GB 18613-2020，但无需在供应前将各型号电动机注册至政府数据库。CCC（强制性产品认证）适用于 CNCA 强制认证目录所列的特定产品类别；一般工业三相电动机通常不在强制 CCC 目录内，因此在中国国内供应通常无需供应前 CCC 注册。澳大利亚与中国之间不存在关于 GEMS 注册的双边互认安排。
summary.zht: 中國對電動機沒有類似澳洲 GEMS 注冊系統的供應前產品注冊要求。中國製造商在國內銷售須符合 GB 18613-2020，但無需在供應前將各型號電動機注冊至政府數據庫。CCC（強制性產品認證）適用於 CNCA 強制認證目錄所列的特定產品類別；一般工業三相電動機通常不在強制 CCC 目錄內，因此在中國國內供應通常無需供應前 CCC 注冊。澳洲與中國之間不存在關於 GEMS 注冊的雙邊互認安排。

standards_or_laws: GB 18613-2020 (mandatory minimum efficiency — no registry equivalent)
CNCA CCC compulsory catalogue (standard industrial three-phase motors generally exempt — verify current catalogue)

gap.en: The GEMS Registry pre-supply registration requirement is the single most structurally unique Australian market-access barrier for Chinese motor exporters. It has no Chinese equivalent: no amount of technical compliance or Chinese certifications substitutes for GEMS registration. The responsible supplier (typically the Australian importer) must: (1) create a GEMS Registry account; (2) submit the product model, test data, and efficiency class declaration; (3) obtain a registration number; and (4) ensure the registration is current before each supply. Chinese manufacturers can assist by providing IEC 60034-2-1 test data and product specifications, but the registration obligation rests with the Australian-based responsible supplier.
gap.zh: GEMS 注册系统供应前注册要求是中国电动机出口商面临的最具结构性特征的澳大利亚市场准入障碍，在中国无任何对应制度：任何技术合规或中国认证均无法替代 GEMS 注册。责任供应商（通常为澳大利亚进口商）须：(1) 创建 GEMS 注册系统账户；(2) 提交产品型号、测试数据及能效等级声明；(3) 获取注册编号；(4) 确保在每次供应前注册有效。中国制造商可提供 IEC 60034-2-1 测试数据和产品规格以协助注册，但注册义务由澳大利亚本地责任供应商承担。
gap.zht: GEMS 注冊系統供應前注冊要求是中國電動機出口商面臨的最具結構性特徵的澳洲市場准入障礙，在中國無任何對應制度：任何技術合規或中國認證均無法替代 GEMS 注冊。責任供應商（通常為澳洲進口商）須：(1) 創建 GEMS 注冊系統帳戶；(2) 提交產品型號、測試數據及能效等級聲明；(3) 獲取注冊編號；(4) 確保在每次供應前注冊有效。中國製造商可提供 IEC 60034-2-1 測試數據和產品規格以協助注冊，但注冊義務由澳洲本地責任供應商承擔。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] GEMS Registry pre-supply registration is a non-negotiable prerequisite for motor supply in Australia. It cannot be replaced by any Chinese certification. The Australian importer must hold a current registration before the first shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] GEMS 注册系统的供应前注册是在澳大利亚供应电动机的不可缺少的前提条件，无法由任何中国认证替代。澳大利亚进口商须在首次发货前持有有效注册。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] GEMS 注冊系統的供應前注冊是在澳洲供應電動機的不可或缺的前提條件，無法由任何中國認證替代。澳洲進口商須在首次發貨前持有有效注冊。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — GEMS Act 2012 offence to supply without valid GEMS registration
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable — no equivalent pre-supply registry in China for industrial motors

source.publisher: GEMS Act 2012 and GEMS Registry — energyrating.gov.au

requirement_topic.en: RCM mark — Regulatory Compliance Mark for electrical safety and EMC
requirement_topic.zh: RCM 标志 — 电气安全与 EMC 监管合规标志
requirement_topic.zht: RCM 標誌 — 電氣安全與 EMC 監管合規標誌

summary.en: The RCM (Regulatory Compliance Mark) is the single mark demonstrating compliance with both Australian electrical safety requirements (under state/territory legislation administered through the EESS) and EMC requirements (under ACMA's framework). It replaced the separate A-Tick (EMC) and C-Tick marks from 2013. For industrial motors, the RCM mark must be affixed before supply. The supplier must hold a Compliance Folder containing test reports, a Declaration of Conformity, and supporting technical documentation. The RCM is not a third-party certification mark — it is a self-declaration mark backed by the supplier's Compliance Folder, which ACMA or state electrical safety regulators may audit.
summary.zh: RCM（监管合规标志）是证明同时符合澳大利亚电气安全要求（通过 EESS 框架由各州/领地立法管理）和 EMC 要求（通过 ACMA 框架）的单一标志。自 2013 年起，RCM 取代了原来单独的 A-Tick（EMC）和 C-Tick 标志。对于工业电动机，须在供应前加贴 RCM 标志。供应商须持有合规文件夹，内含测试报告、符合性声明及相关技术文件。RCM 不是第三方认证标志，而是由供应商合规文件夹支持的自我声明标志，ACMA 或各州电气安全监管机构可对此进行审计。
summary.zht: RCM（監管合規標誌）是證明同時符合澳洲電氣安全要求（通過 EESS 框架由各州/領地立法管理）和 EMC 要求（通過 ACMA 框架）的單一標誌。自 2013 年起，RCM 取代了原來單獨的 A-Tick（EMC）和 C-Tick 標誌。對於工業電動機，須在供應前加貼 RCM 標誌。供應商須持有合規文件夾，內含測試報告、符合性聲明及相關技術文件。RCM 不是第三方認證標誌，而是由供應商合規文件夾支持的自我聲明標誌，ACMA 或各州電氣安全監管機構可對此進行審計。

standards_or_laws: State and Territory Electrical Safety Acts

summary.en: China's CCC (China Compulsory Certification) mark is a third-party mandatory certification mark for products in the compulsory catalogue. However, standard industrial three-phase motors are generally not in the current CNCA CCC compulsory catalogue, so most Chinese industrial motors are supplied without a CCC mark. The CCC mark does not satisfy RCM requirements and cannot be used in place of the RCM. There is no bilateral mark-recognition arrangement between Australia and China.
summary.zh: 中国 CCC（强制性产品认证）标志是强制认证目录中产品的第三方强制认证标志。然而，一般工业三相电动机通常不在现行 CNCA 强制 CCC 目录内，因此大多数中国工业电动机无需贴附 CCC 标志供应。CCC 标志不能满足 RCM 要求，也不能用以替代 RCM 标志。澳大利亚与中国之间不存在标志互认安排。
summary.zht: 中國 CCC（強制性產品認證）標誌是強制認證目錄中產品的第三方強制認證標誌。然而，一般工業三相電動機通常不在現行 CNCA 強制 CCC 目錄內，因此大多數中國工業電動機無需貼附 CCC 標誌供應。CCC 標誌不能滿足 RCM 要求，也不能用以替代 RCM 標誌。澳洲與中國之間不存在標誌互認安排。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — domestic market only; not an RCM equivalent
CNCA CCC compulsory catalogue (standard industrial three-phase motors generally not listed — verify)

gap.en: Chinese industrial motors generally do not carry the RCM mark and are not prepared with the Compliance Folder required under Australian EESS and ACMA rules. The gap is both technical (test reports must reference AS/NZS standards, not only GB standards) and administrative (the Compliance Folder must be established and held in Australia). Neither the CCC mark nor Chinese test certificates substitute for the RCM. The Australian importer or supplier must: prepare the Compliance Folder with AS/NZS-referenced test evidence; affix the RCM mark before supply; and register as a supplier on the EESS portal for in-scope electrical equipment.
gap.zh: 中国工业电动机通常不带有 RCM 标志，也未按澳大利亚 EESS 和 ACMA 规则准备合规文件夹。差距同时体现在技术层面（测试报告须引用 AS/NZS 标准，而非仅 GB 标准）和行政层面（合规文件夹须在澳大利亚建立并持有）。CCC 标志和中国测试证书均不能替代 RCM。澳大利亚进口商或供应商须：准备引用 AS/NZS 标准测试证据的合规文件夹；在供应前加贴 RCM 标志；并就涵盖范围内的电气设备在 EESS 门户注册为供应商。
gap.zht: 中國工業電動機通常不帶有 RCM 標誌，也未按澳洲 EESS 和 ACMA 規則準備合規文件夾。差距同時體現在技術層面（測試報告須引用 AS/NZS 標準，而非僅 GB 標準）和行政層面（合規文件夾須在澳洲建立並持有）。CCC 標誌和中國測試證書均不能替代 RCM。澳洲進口商或供應商須：準備引用 AS/NZS 標準測試證據的合規文件夾；在供應前加貼 RCM 標誌；並就涵蓋範圍內的電氣設備在 EESS 門戶注冊為供應商。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The RCM mark is mandatory for motor supply in Australia. Chinese manufacturers do not automatically hold this mark. The Australian responsible supplier must establish the Compliance Folder, obtain AS/NZS-referenced test evidence, and affix the RCM mark before supply. This is separate from and additional to GEMS Registration.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] RCM 标志是在澳大利亚供应电动机的强制要求。中国制造商不会自动持有该标志。澳大利亚责任供应商须建立合规文件夹、获取引用 AS/NZS 标准的测试证据，并在供应前加贴 RCM 标志。这与 GEMS 注册相互独立，需单独履行。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] RCM 標誌是在澳洲供應電動機的強制要求。中國製造商不會自動持有該標誌。澳洲責任供應商須建立合規文件夾、獲取引用 AS/NZS 標準的測試證據，並在供應前加貼 RCM 標誌。這與 GEMS 注冊相互獨立，需單獨履行。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — RCM mark required before supply in Australia for electrical equipment
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable — CCC mark exists for products in the compulsory catalogue but is not an RCM equivalent; standard industrial motors generally not in the compulsory CCC catalogue
